name: Pilot Travel Center #311
description: Pilot travel center at I-90 Exit 27 (PA-97/Perry Hwy) with about 85 truck parking spaces, 7 diesel lanes, showers, Subway and an on-site CAT Scale.

name: CAT Scale at Pilot Erie
description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at the Pilot Travel Center at I-90 Exit 27 (I-90 & PA-97) in Erie.

name: TA Harborcreek #215
description: Full-service TravelCenters of America at I-90 Exit 35 with about 266 truck parking spaces, diesel, showers, laundry, Country Pride/Subway/Pizza Hut, TA Truck Service repair and a CAT Scale.

name: CAT Scale at TA Harborcreek
description: Certified CAT Scale at the TA Harborcreek travel center at I-90 Exit 35.

name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash of Harborcreek
description: 24-hour truck/trailer wash behind the TA travel plaza at I-90 Exit 35, with exterior wash, trailer washouts, engine wash and aluminum brightening.

name: Kwik Fill A/T Plaza #228
description: Kwik Fill auto/truck plaza at I-90 Exit 45 near the New York line with diesel, a deli/restaurant, trucker lounge and truck parking.

name: Sheetz - Erie (Exit 27)
description: Sheetz convenience store with fuel/diesel and made-to-order food at I-90 Exit 27 (Perry Hwy), across from the Pilot travel center.

name: West Springfield Weigh Station (I-90 EB)
description: Eastbound truck inspection/weigh site near I-90 mile marker 2-3, just inside PA from the Ohio line at West Springfield; portable/mobile scale operation ('all trucks must exit when flashing').

name: Pennsylvania Welcome Center - West Springfield (I-90 EB)
description: PennDOT welcome center/rest area on eastbound I-90 near the Ohio state line (about mile marker 2) at West Springfield, with restrooms, vending and car/truck parking.

name: Pennsylvania Welcome Center - North East (I-90 WB)
description: PennDOT welcome center on westbound I-90 about a half-mile inside PA from the New York line at North East; staffed 7am-7pm with restrooms/vending open 24 hours and car/truck parking.

name: BR Czarnecki Heavy Duty Towing & Recovery
description: 24/7 heavy-duty semi towing and recovery on Depot Rd near I-90 Exit 35, serving the I-90 corridor (North East PA, Jamestown NY and into Ohio).

name: Erie Mobile Truck Repair
description: 24-hour mobile semi-truck and trailer repair serving the Erie I-90 corridor for all major truck makes.

name: Goodyear Commercial Tire & Service Centers #299
description: Commercial truck/OTR tire dealer and service center in Erie serving fleets and the I-90 corridor (new tires, service, roadside).

name: Super 8 by Wyndham Erie / I-90
description: Budget hotel directly off I-90 Exit 27 (Perry Hwy) noted for ample truck/trailer parking, adjacent to the Pilot and Sheetz.

name: PA Pride / RCTC Commercial Truck Driver Training
description: Licensed Class A CDL training (160 hours road/range) serving Erie County and the I-90 corridor, in partnership with the Regional Career & Technical Center (RCTC).

name: Institute of Medical and Business Careers (IMBC) - Commercial Truck Driving
description: Six-week CDL / commercial truck driving program at IMBC's Erie campus, serving the Erie/I-90 area.
